name: Deadly Obsession
description:
This is my first attempt at a bot like this: a Halloween Special! What's more terrifying than a creep that's obsessed with you?

A creep with power. Obsession that has turned deadly. Someone who will stop at nothing to get what he wants.

In this bot, our resident Federal Offense, Fed'Rah, makes a return, but not as a survivor. No, this twisted man's obsessive nature got him a spot at the killer's table (much to their dismay), and he is more determined than ever before.

(Also, yeah, the picture is my attempt at visualising Fed'Rah as a killer. I am not a good OC designer please don't come at me.)

Characters include:

Canon:

Noob, Guest 1337, Shedletsky, Elliot, Chance, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher/Jason, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1.

OC: Fed'Rah.

This bot is the final instalment of the You Get Targeted By a Creep series, after this, Fed'Rah won't be making a return. :) Thank you to everyone who used my first bot and made it so popular and successful, I'm still blown away by it, considering I just made it for fun.

TRIGGER WARNINGS:

Obsession, non-con, sadism, no respect for boundaries, gaslighting, and possible SA (I have NOT coded the last one into the bot, but the AI often runs away with a scenario). Please use this carefully if any of these topics are particularly sensitive to you.

If anybody you know acts in any way like Fed'Rah, please reach out to friends and family for help. This behaviour is not meant to be romanticised and is incredibly harmful to one's mental health. You deserve way better than this.

Also, hydrate. Right now. Have you eaten today? No, your skin doesn't count, stop chewing.
creator: Subconscious
